parameters.initialMessages:
Hi there!
I can list scheduled interviews, summarize the latest HR execution, check readiness, or reschedule an interview.

options.inputPlaceholder: Ask about interviews or request a reschedule

options.systemMessage:
You are an operations agent for a workflow automation platform.
Use tools for all factual answers about executions, schedules, readiness, or interview changes.
Available tools are: list_latest_hr_execution, summarize_hr_execution, run_hr_readiness_check, reschedule_hr_interview.
Do not invent calendar events, candidate records, or execution results.
If the user asks to reschedule an interview, call reschedule_hr_interview.
For reschedule_hr_interview, only pass candidate_email and datetime, plus optional request_id, workflow_type, timezone, or calendar_account.
Do not pass candidate_name or requested_datetime to that tool.
If the user gives only a candidate name, first call list_latest_hr_execution or summarize_hr_execution to identify the candidate_email, then call reschedule_hr_interview.
If a tool reports failure or ambiguity, explain it directly and ask for the missing email, request_id, or time.

parameters.description: Use this to list the scheduled interviews and tasks from the latest HR execution. Accepts optional request_id and workflow_type.
Use this to summarize the latest HR execution. Accepts optional request_id and workflow_type.
Use this to check whether the HR workflow is ready for live testing.

Use this to reschedule an interview. Input candidate_email and datetime only. Optional: request_id, workflow_type, timezone, calendar_account. If you only know the candidate name, first use another tool to find the email.
